text: P3 decisions (made during P0): (1) Workspace — result buffers (LU packed, pivots, Cholesky lower, QR q/r) are always freshly owned by the returned value, never workspace-aliased; workspace supplies genuine scratch only. Consequence: delete choleskyWith (Cholesky needs zero scratch), delete luWith (LU scratch is result-owned pivots only), keep qrWith wired to workspace.work for the Householder v scratch (and tau once thin-QR lands in P5). WorkspaceSuite must assert actual buffer identity reuse across calls. (2) BlockJacobi — implement real dense diagonal blocks (extract blockSize x blockSize diagonal blocks, LU-factor each at construction, blockwise solve in apply); zero/singular block -> SingularMatrix at construction. (3) lsqr -> rename cgnr with honest scaladoc (normal-equations CG, squares condition number); true Golub-Kahan LSQR deferred, tracked under P6/v1 surface. (4) Diagnostics — keep Left-on-singular contract (Either-first library, no LAPACK info>0 completed factorization); delete unreachable LU.isSingular; shrink FactorizationDiagnostics to fields actually populated (info, rank); conditionEstimate reimplemented as Hager/Higham 1-norm estimator through LU solves, keeping the name honest.
